title: Essential Oils for Diffusers for Home – Well-Being Essential Oils Set of 6 x 10ml – Rose Garden, Southern Blossom, Zen, California Sunshine and More – Aromatherapy Oil & Diffuser Oils Fragrance
features: 6 Signature Blends Essential Oils Set – Rose Garden, Relaxing Breeze, Serenity, Southern Blossom, Zen, and California Sunshine, perfect essential oils for diffusers for home to suit every mood and occasion.

Premium Aromatherapy Oil Quality – Each essential oil blend features pure botanical extracts like rose, lavender, sandalwood, and bergamot, delivering authentic fragrance oil aromas without synthetic additives.

Versatile Diffuser Oils Fragrance – Use as diffuser oil, oil for diffuser, or fragrance oils for diffuser in oil diffusers, humidifiers, burners, DIY candles, soaps, room sprays, and even essential oils for cleaning.

For All Oils for Diffusers Lovers – From floral and citrus to woody scents, our oil diffuser essential oils set provides diverse options to create a welcoming atmosphere at home, in the office, or in spa settings.

Gift-Ready Essential Oil Set – Beautifully packaged, this aromatherapy oil collection is ideal for gifting, suitable for birthdays, Christmas, or simply as a relaxing treat for yourself or loved ones.

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Make sure that essential oils do not get into the eyes or sensitive skin areas. Keep the oils out of reach of children and pets. Only use the oils in a water-filled aromatherapy diffuser or humidifier and not for oral use.
